div.p: For an article by Rear Admiral H. C. Shepheard of the United States Coast Guard and John W. Mann, Acting Adviser on Shipping in the Office of Transport and Communications Policy of the Department of State, concerning the International Conference on Pollution of the Seas and Coasts, held at London April 26–May 12, 1954, see the Department of State Bulletin, August 30, 1954, page 311.
